programme.title: World Championship Sumo
programme.desc: From Prudential Center in Newark, NJ.

programme.title: BKFC 31: Richman vs. Doolittle
programme.desc: Features Mike Richman vs. Isaac Doolittle, Jake Lindsey vs. Brandon Girtz, plus Chris Camozzi vs. Bubba McDaniel in bare knuckle boxing action from Broomfield, Colo. From Oct.15, 2022.

programme.title: PFL Vault
programme.desc: Throwback to some of PFL's inaugural season's biggest hands landed including regular season and win or go home playoff agony.

programme.title: PFL Vault
programme.desc: MMA fighters don't get paid by the hour and PFL fighters earn points for Fast Finishes like these.

programme.title: Total Combat Presents
programme.desc: On this edition of Total Combat Presents. We take you into the NFC world of martial arts.

programme.title: Coach and Company
programme.desc: Jonathan Coachman hosts this no-holds-barred daily sports talk show. "The Coach" leads dynamic discussions with a rotating cast of all-star analysts and sports insiders.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Classic mixed martial arts action from Bellator.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Patricio Pitbull meets undefeated phenom AJ "Mercenary" McKee in the main event. From July 31, 2021.

programme.desc: Boxing in its purest form, with no gloves and hands are wrapped only.

programme.desc: Hector Lombard tries to defend the cruiserweight title against Lorenzo Hunt, while Dat Nguyen looks to take the lightweight title from Luis Palomino. From Nov. 19, 2021.

programme.title: PFL Vault
programme.desc: Everyone has a game plan... until they get punched in the face. These heavy hitters throw heavy leather looking to get the KO finish.

programme.title: PFL Vault: Elbows
programme.desc: Back when elbows were allowed, WSOF Fighters made ample use of such tool, and delivered some thrilling TKOs.

programme.title: Adventure Cities
programme.desc: Jonathan Thompson heads to Las Vegas to discover what lies beyond the Strip, uncovering underrated adventures.

programme.title: Adventure Cities
programme.desc: Jonathan Thompson journeys to Sydney, Australia, in search of the most unforgettable adventure experiences.

programme.title: Khanh Ong’s Wild Food
programme.desc: Chef Khanh Ong takes a ride on the Spirit of Tasmania to explore Northern Tasmania and tries out hunting.

programme.desc: In this episode we follow the Ski Patrol as they deal with emergencies in regards to high-speed accidents.

programme.desc: This episode takes us off the coast of England aboard Sealand, a micronation founded by a quixotic adventurer.
